name: spendlens-android
description: Capacitor Android wrapper for SpendLens — wraps the PWA in ../app and adds on-device SMS + notification (email/bank-push) capture.
comment: This version field is NOT the app version — it is a private, unpublished wrapper. The authoritative running version is CI-stamped into app/js/version.js (APP_VERSION) from the release git tag. Capacitor deps are pinned to exact versions for reproducible APK builds; commit a package-lock.json and switch CI to `npm ci` once a Node toolchain is available to also pin transitive deps.

scripts.apk: npm run sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
